generation_note: Deterministic documentation-discovery checkpoint; counts exclude files created by this tranche from the source corpus.
batch_name: Arranger Project Docs + UI Design Inventory Handoff v1

read_status_summary.note: The fully-read count includes priority repo Markdown, all repo UI-reporting Markdown, all design-lab Markdown, and all twelve scoped JSON artifacts; HTML prototypes were source-inspected and are counted as partially read.

key_decisions: Full portfolio revaluation controls scenario-impact methodology.
Lenses and themes classify after valuation; they do not price positions.
One primary bucket per position per lens is the v1 additive-classification rule.
Advisor policy attribution and manager mandate attribution are separate responsibility layers.
Equal-weight attribution is diagnostic unless explicitly selected as policy.
Advisor Policy Attribution v2 supersedes Policy-Level Attribution Summary v1 as the primary product surface.
Manager Driver Attribution Matrix is the accepted all-manager component dialogue report.
External manager stories are translated, not endorsed or verified.
Candidate proxies require approval and are not recommendations.
Ordered report workflows should drive the advisor UI instead of a raw report library.
Advisor builder and client presenter are distinct surfaces.
Internal analytics control-plane UI is required later but is not the next build.
Private client-data execution must minimize unnecessary Arranger visibility.
The Plan Check is selected only for the first client-report story.
Objective Horizon is preferred for refinement but is not a frozen global visual system.
The application architecture remains unresolved among Briefing Desk, Arangur Guide, and Investment Library.
recommended_next_tranche: Advisor Workflow UI Integration Blueprint v1
warnings: External UI design-lab files are inputs, not repo-canonical decisions until integrated.
The Plan Check selection does not select an application interaction architecture.
Objective Horizon is preferred but not frozen or approved as the global report style.
The design-only client objective, growth, allocation-tolerance, downside-boundary, and probability-range values are not supplied client facts.
The current app and July 12 product docs are newer than several June UI-model documents; blueprint work must reconcile rather than blindly preserve either.
No UI, analytics, deployment, external API, live data, or real client-data changes were authorized or made.
